# AMTECH Agent Skills

> Free AMTECH skills that teach AI agents how to use them from one link.

- [OKF Audit Skill](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit): A consumable AMTECH skill for auditing articles, websites, drafts, sitemaps, and OKF bundles for AI-readable knowledge quality.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/manifest.json)
- [Knowledge Graph Builder](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder): A consumable AMTECH skill that generates a large knowledge graph for SEO and AI-readable content from a business, website, product, or topic.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/manifest.json)
